Bash(python3 -c "
import re, json

with open('/Users/agentcafe/.config/kilo/kilo.jsonc', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()

# Strip // comments
stripped = re.sub(r'//[^\n]*', '', raw)

# Find all literal control characters (newlines, tabs, etc.) inside JSON strings
# Scan character by character
in_string = False
escape_next = False
for i, ch in enumerate(stripped):
    if escape_next:
        escape_next = False
        continue
    if ch == '\\\\':
        escape_next = True
        continue
    if ch == '\"':
        in_string = not in_string
        continue
    if in_string and ord(ch) < 0x20:
        # Find line number
        line_num = stripped[:i].count('\n') + 1
        col = i - stripped[:i].rfind('\n')
        print(f'Control char U+{ord(ch):04X} at line {line_num}, col {col}, char {i}')
        # Show context
        print('  Context:', repr(stripped[max(0,i-30):i+30]))
        print()
" 2)
